SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-18-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-18-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF SUSAN LEE APPEARED. DEFENDANTS DURKI DIAZ JIMENEZ AND NELSON MATAMOROS APPEARED, MS. JIMENEZ ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER MONICA HERNANDEZ, AND BOTH DEFENDANTS WAIVED SERVICE. DEFENDANTS' EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, SUSAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JIMENEZ, DURKI DIAZ MATAMOROS, NELSON $6,394.00 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,539.00, DEFENDANTS JIMENEZ AND MATAMOROS JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY LIABLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SC-220 REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT JIMENEZ, DURKI DIAZ

ORDER ON REQUEST FOR TIME PAYMENTS (SC-222).THE REQUEST IS "APPROVED", AND THE COURT ORDERS:PAYMENTS OF $384.64 ON THE 1ST DAY OF EACH MONTH, STARTING DATE: 01-01-2024 UNTIL: 05-01-2025. THE AMOUNT OF FINAL PAYMENT: $384.76.
